signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | MED confidence**

March data released via Statistics Korea shows **annual inflation** at 2.2%, up slightly but contained near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid Middle East energy shocks; Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% last week (6th meeting) and raised its 2026 forecast to 2.2% from 2.1
